creator: kennedy.greg@gmail.com
text:
I checked out port sysutils/devcpu-data today and used /usr/local/etc/rc.d/microcode_update start to update the microcode on my Pentium 4 CPU.  The tool returned a success message, but within 10 minutes my system ended up with a kernel panic.  I set microcode_update_enable="YES" in rc.conf to update on boot and each session the system would crash and reboot in 9 or 10 minutes.

Here is the full output from dmesg of a run, showing my CPU and also ending with the kernel panic.

How-To-Repeat: check out sysutils/devcpu-data
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/microcode_update start
wait 10 minutes
